rationale: Mechanic mismatch is the dealbreaker: a top-down stylus bus-sorting puzzle reads as a sort/puzzle ad and will misrepresent Destiny Run's swipe-runner moral-choice loop, risking high IPM but terrible D1 retention and refunds/policy flags for misleading creative. The casual-relaxation hook and female-skewing audience overlap is decent, and the palette has some blue commonality, but the purple/orange member palette and hand-with-stylus framing clash with the bright sky-blue 3D runner aesthetic. Do not ship as-is; if testing the "relaxing question" VO hook, re-shoot over actual Angel/Devil gate gameplay instead.
